ogTitle: Oakhampton vs Oakhampton Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakhampton and Oakhampton Heights.
heading: Oakhampton vs Oakhampton Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakhampton, New South Wales and Oakhampton Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakhampton Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Oakhampton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakhampton or Oakhampton Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakhampton has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Oakhampton Heights scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakhampton scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Oakhampton Heights scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakhampton or Oakhampton Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakhampton Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
